package.name: collision_demo
package.description: Adds bench / rack / tray / housing-wall / no-fly collision objects to MoveIt's planning scene for the HPLC autosampler cell, then runs two Cartesian goals: one that the planner has to route around the housing wall (succeeds), and one whose target sits inside the no-fly cylinder over an already-loaded vial slot (refused). Implements checklist item 20 (autosampler tie-in).
